Case Study • Various

How we helped APackaging Group LLC Sustains EcoVadis Platinum Rating, Ranked Among Top 1% Companies Worldwide

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Setting New Benchmarks in Sustainable Packaging Excellence

APackaging Group LLC, a global leader in custom packaging solutions and supply chain packaging services, continues to maintain the prestigious EcoVadis Platinum Medal for the second consecutive assessment cycle, positioning the company among the top 1% of more than 150,000 companies evaluated worldwide across all industries.

With an outstanding overall EcoVadis score of 95/100 and a 99th percentile ranking, APackaging Group reinforces its long-term commitment to environmental stewardship, ethical business conduct, responsible sourcing, and social responsibility across its global operations. The achievement reflects not only a milestone, but the company’s ongoing effort to consistently sustain the highest level of ESG performance year after year.

The recognition highlights APackaging Group’s fully integrated sustainability strategy — embedding responsible practices into every stage of the packaging lifecycle, from eco-design and material selection to manufacturing oversight, supplier management, and global distribution. The company continues to work with partners and brands to reduce environmental impact while maintaining product performance, quality, and regulatory compliance.

By sustaining this group-level Platinum rating, APackaging Group strengthens its mission to deliver packaging solutions that not only protect products but also actively contribute to a more circular and responsible global economy. The company remains committed to continuously improving its sustainability performance to preserve and advance this recognition in the years ahead.

Measured Performance Across Sustainability Indicators

🏅 EcoVadis Platinum Medal (January 2026)
📊 Overall Score: 95/100 | 99th Percentile (Top 1% Globally)

APackaging Group demonstrated exceptional performance across all four EcoVadis sustainability pillars:

🌿 Environment: 98/100
👥 Labor & Human Rights: 94/100

⚖️ Ethics: 93/100
🔗 Sustainable Procurement: 93/100

This recognition is particularly significant within the packaging industry, where sustainability leadership requires reducing material impact, enabling recyclability, promoting responsible sourcing, and ensuring transparency across complex global supply chains. APackaging Group integrates these principles into its operational processes and customer solutions, supporting measurable ESG progress for partner brands.

Strategic ESG Collaboration

APackaging Group’s EcoVadis Platinum achievement was strengthened through its strategic partnership with Growlity Inc., an ESG and sustainability consulting firm specializing in global ESG frameworks, assessments, and performance improvement programs.

Through this collaboration, APackaging Group implemented structured ESG governance, performance monitoring systems, and continuous improvement initiatives aligned with international sustainability standards. The partnership enabled measurable progress across environmental performance, responsible sourcing, and corporate governance practices.

What Makes This Achievement Remarkable

✨ Global Leadership: Ranked among the top 1% of companies worldwide in sustainability performance

♻️ Circular Economy Focus: Advancing recyclable, reusable, and reduced-impact packaging designs

📦 Customer Partnership: Helping brands meet regulatory and environmental commitments

🌏 Responsible Supply Chain: Strengthening supplier transparency and accountability

The Strategic Partnership Behind the Success

“Retaining the EcoVadis Platinum rating demonstrates the strength and consistency of our sustainability systems and the dedication of our global teams. Our focus is on embedding responsible practices into everyday operations — from supplier engagement to packaging design and delivery.

We view sustainability as an operational discipline that requires ongoing measurement, accountability, and improvement. This recognition reinforces our commitment to maintain high standards and continue advancing meaningful progress for our customers, partners, and the environment.”

—Helga Arminak

President, APackaging Group LLC

“Receiving the EcoVadis Platinum rating for the second time is a proud milestone for APackaging Group. Sustainability is not a separate initiative — it is embedded in how we innovate, source, and deliver packaging solutions every day.

Our responsibility goes beyond packaging products. We aim to support our customers’ sustainability goals, protect resources, and contribute to a more circular and responsible global economy. This recognition motivates us to continue raising our standards and driving measurable impact.” We gratefully acknowledge Growlity’s support throughout this journey in converting our sustainability vision into actionable programs and quantifiable progress

—Mr.Don Stover

Director of Corporate Quality, APackaging Group LLC

“Growlity Inc. stated that APackaging Group’s recognition reflects a strong leadership commitment toward responsible business practices and structured ESG implementation. The company’s proactive adoption of sustainability principles demonstrates how packaging organizations can integrate environmental responsibility, ethical governance, and supply chain accountability into daily operations.”

—Dr.Nitin Dumasia

President & CEO, Growlity Pvt Ltd.

“APackaging Group’s continued recognition at the EcoVadis Platinum level demonstrates a mature and well-structured ESG framework supported by strong internal accountability and measurable performance tracking. Their approach shows how sustainability can be effectively integrated into operational processes rather than treated as a standalone initiative.

Through consistent monitoring, supplier engagement, and data-driven improvement programs, the organization has strengthened both environmental impact management and governance practices.”

—Mr.Parth Kapadia

Consultant – Green Building Certification

Company Overview – APackaging Group LLC

APackaging Group LLC is a global packaging solutions provider specializing in custom packaging development, sourcing, manufacturing coordination, and supply chain management. The company partners with brands across industries to deliver innovative, high-quality, and sustainable packaging solutions that enhance product value while minimizing environmental impact. Through innovation, operational excellence, and responsible practices, APackaging Group supports clients in achieving performance, compliance, and sustainability objectives worldwide.

About Growlity Inc.

Growlity Inc. is an ESG and sustainability consulting firm helping organizations improve ESG performance, measure environmental impact, strengthen governance frameworks, and align operations with international sustainability standards. The company supports businesses through ESG assessments, reporting, strategy development, and continuous improvement programs to build long-term responsible value.

Growth with Sustainability. Your trusted partner for ESG transformation and climate action.
